title: Fresh Gooey Comforting Tunisian Cornmeal Pastry
description: This traditional Tunisian pastry is made with fine yellow cornmeal and a long-fermentation-dough, perfect for a comforting breakfast treat.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the cornmeal, flour, yeast, and salt.
Add the olive oil, water, honey, and rosemary to the dry ingredients and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 10 minutes, until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
On a floured surface, roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Cut into 12 equal pieces and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the pastry is baking, mix the feta cheese, unsalted butter, and egg in a small bowl.
Remove the pastry from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Spread the feta mixture on top of the pastry and drizzle with unsweetened yogurt.
Return to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the pastry is golden brown.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Cut into wedges and serve warm.
